2604.25580.title: Bye Bye Perspective API: Lessons for Measurement Infrastructure in NLP, CSS and LLM Evaluation
2604.25580.paper_summary: The closure of Perspective API at the end of 2026 discards what has functioned as the de facto standard for automated toxicity measurement in NLP, CSS, and LLM evaluation research. We document the structural dependence that the communities built on this single proprietary tool and discuss how this dependence caused epistemic problems that have affected - and will likely continue to affect - collective research efforts. Perspective's model was periodically updated without versioning or disclosure, its annotation structure reflected a single corporate operationalisation of a contested concept, and its scores were used simultaneously as an evaluation target and an evaluation standard. Its closure leaves behind non-updatable benchmarks, irreproducible results, and ultimately a field at risk of perpetuating these issues by turning to closed-source LLMs. We use Perspective's announced termination as an opportunity to call for an independent, valid, adaptable, and reproducible toxicity and hate speech measurement infrastructure, with the technical and governance requirements outlined in this paper.
2604.25580.paper_summary_zh: 結束於2026年底的Perspective API捨棄了作為NLP、CSS和LLM評估研究中自動化毒性測量的事實標準的功能。我們記錄了社群對這個單一專有工具的結構性依賴，並討論了這種依賴如何造成了影響——並可能繼續影響——集體研究努力的認識論問題。Perspective的模型定期更新，但沒有版本控制或披露，其註釋結構反映了一個有爭議概念的單一企業操作化，並且其分數同時被用作評估目標和評估標準。它的關閉留下了無法更新的基準、不可重現的結果，以及最終一個有風險的領域，可能因轉向封閉源的LLM而延續這些問題。我們利用Perspective宣布終止的機會，呼籲建立一個獨立、有效、可適應和可重現的毒性和仇恨言論測量基礎設施，並在本文中概述了技術和治理要求。
2604.25580.author: David Hartmann et.al.
2604.25580.authors: David Hartmann, Manuel Tonneau, Angelie Kraft, LK Seiling, Dimitri Staufer, Pieter Delobelle, Jan Fillies, Anna Ricarda Luther, Jan Batzner, Mareike Lisker
